programs.title: Newsnight, followed by Weather
programs.desc: Insights and global interviews on the crucial news stories of the day. Followed by Weather.

programs.title: Unspun World with John Simpson
programs.desc: John Simpson analyses the Iranian position in their confrontation with the United States in the Gulf and examines the state of play in Russia's war with Ukraine.

programs.title: This Is a Bomb: The Nevada Casino Heist
programs.desc: Unbeknownst to the FBI, a quiet Hungarian immigrant landscaper, with no apparent ties to organised crime and no known record, concocts an elaborate extortion plan.

programs.title: See Hear: Travel Uncovered
programs.desc: A look at travel in the deaf community, with tips for deaf travellers, solo adventures around the world and stories of confidence, independence and discovery.

programs.title: MasterChef
programs.desc: A new set of incredible amateur cooks take on the MasterChef heats hoping to secure a quarter-final place. Their first task is to serve up an impressive signature dish.

programs.title: The Young Offenders
programs.desc: Mairéad and the lads take the family car on a road trip to pick up her unpredictable mother, but disaster strikes. Contains some strong language.
